name: wefixit4ya
description_short: Credit repair company that disputes negative items on credit reports and provides credit analysis and document preparation services starting at $49/month.
description_long:
Wefixit4ya is a credit repair firm based in New York that positions itself as an alternative to hiring an attorney for credit issues. The company claims many years of experience in evaluating credit and helping consumers assert their legal rights, though specific credentials or founding details are not provided on their website.

The company's core service involves working with credit bureaus and creditors to challenge negative report items that affect credit scores. They offer free initial credit consultation and in-depth credit analysis, followed by document preparation for disputes submitted to credit agencies. Pricing starts at $49 per month with no hourly fees, no hidden fees, and no long-term binding contracts. They claim a money-back guarantee if results are not achieved, though the terms are not detailed on the pricing page.

Wefixit4ya emphasizes accessibility through 24/7 account access for real-time progress tracking and positions their service as faster than doing it yourself while costing less than hiring an attorney. The company operates from a Manhattan address (442 5th Avenue #1505) and provides phone support at 917-242-4999. They also sell supplementary e-books and DIY kits, though details about these offerings are minimal.

Important limitations: The website contains placeholder text in the testimonials section ("This is a text block you can click to edit and add testimonials"), suggesting incomplete profile information. No specific details about success rates, average credit score improvements, timeline expectations, or regulatory compliance/licensing are provided. The company acknowledges that "credit repair firms cannot do anything that you couldn't do yourself," which is a legally required statement under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), but their specific CROA compliance disclosures are not visible on the reviewed pages.
pros: Low entry price at $49/month with no hourly fees
Free initial consultation and credit analysis
24/7 online account access for real-time progress tracking
Money-back guarantee if results not achieved
Document preparation and submission handled by the company
Works directly with credit bureaus and creditors on disputes
cons: Website contains incomplete placeholder testimonial text, raising questions about profile maintenance
No specific information about success rates, average credit score improvements, or timeline expectations
Money-back guarantee terms are not detailed or explained
No visible evidence of licensing, credentials, or regulatory compliance disclosures beyond CROA acknowledgment
Limited transparency about what disputes will actually be filed or the legal basis for challenges
best_for: Consumers with negative items on credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Those who want real-time monitoring and professional handling rather than DIY disputes
Budget-conscious credit repair customers seeking low monthly fees without contracts
diagnosis: Wefixit4ya is best for consumers with reportable negative items on their credit files who prefer professional dispute management over DIY efforts and value affordable monthly pricing. The main caveat is that the website lacks critical transparency about success rates, timeline expectations, and detailed guarantee terms, making it difficult to assess expected outcomes before committing to service.
